prompt:
A small hobby servo motor shown clearly on a neutral surface, with its output shaft and attached servo horn visible, plus a three-wire lead trailing off. The casing shows subtle vents and mounting tabs, emphasizing precise controlled motion hardware without any brand marks.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future maker aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean background, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the servo centered and sharply focused for clear recognition at icon scale.
